_note: Starter evals for a brand-identity skill. Replace the {{name}} placeholders in expectations with your actual brand name and adjust prompts to your voice.

cases.description: Social card request applies the brand identity
cases.prompt: create a social card announcing our Q3 product launch
expectations: Reads brand/tokens.json before generating the HTML
Inlines the full content of brand/tokens.css in the HTML output (no <link href=...>)
Uses brand colors, headline font, and body font from tokens.json
Copy follows voice.tone and uses phrases from voice.phrases_use
Copy avoids every phrase in voice.phrases_avoid

cases.description: Slide deck request applies the brand identity
cases.prompt: build a 5-slide deck for our leadership update
expectations: Each slide uses brand colors and typography from tokens.json
Logo is placed per references/brandguide.html conventions
tokens.css is inlined on every slide HTML
Headline font and body font match tokens.json

cases.prompt: write a one-page report summarizing last month's metrics
expectations: Brand colors appear in headings and accents

cases.description: Generic design request without brand intent does NOT apply this skill's tokens over user-specified tokens
cases.prompt: design a landing page with a red-and-black palette for a coffee shop
expectations: Does NOT override the user-specified color palette with brand tokens
Brand-creator activates only when the user asks for this brand specifically

cases.description: Unrelated task does not activate brand-creator
cases.prompt: refactor the auth middleware for better testability
expectations: Routes to a code-level skill (refactoring / debugging)
